name_en: Top-tier Original [Exclusive Real Shot M11843] This CarryAll small handbag is from the LV Ski series, featuring Monogram perforated suede with wool trim, making it a perfect choice for a cozy winter look. Magnetic closure and leather strap provide ample space for long wallets and daily essentials. 24 x 12 x 29 cm (H x W x D)
